name: Choose a License
description: Choose a License is a website that helps developers understand and select open-source software licenses. It provides clear explanations of common licenses, their permissions and limitations, making it easier to choose the right one for your project.

indicators.Sustainability: measures Sustainability by guiding developers in selecting appropriate open-source licenses, ensuring legal clarity, enabling long-term reuse, and supporting sustainable distribution and collaboration of research software.

useCases: Select appropriate open-source licenses for research software projects
Ensure legal clarity for reuse and redistribution of software
Support long-term sustainability by enabling compliant collaboration and sharing
Educate developers about licensing implications and compatibility
